articles.description: Kimi Antonelli takes his first Formula 1 victory in leading team-mate George Russell to a Mercedes one-two in the Chinese Grand Prix.
articles.title: Chinese Grand Prix 2026: Kimi Antonelli wins ahead of Russell

articles.description: History, records, upsets, high-scoring classics - and a thrilling finale. The 2026 Six Nations is likely to go down as the best edition in the tournament's history.
articles.title: Six Nations 2026: France v England finale worthy of greatest ever Six Nations

articles.description: Jadon Sancho is set to leave Manchester United this summer, almost three years after his last Premier League appearance for the club.
articles.title: Man Utd v Aston Villa: How Jadon Sancho's dream United move became a nightmare

articles.description: Newcastle United's match-winner against Chelsea, Anthony Gordon, responds to "complete nonsense" from pundits Wayne Rooney and Alan Shearer.
articles.title: Anthony Gordon: Newcastle forward hits back at 'complete nonsense' from Rooney and Shearer

articles.description: There was an unusual addition to Chelsea's huddle before their game against Newcastle at Stamford Bridge - referee Paul Tierney.
articles.title: Chelsea huddle: Why was referee Paul Tierney in the middle of  Blues' pre-match huddle?

articles.description: Bryson DeChambeau wins his fourth LIV Golf title following a 'brutal' play-off victory over wildcard Richard T Lee
articles.title: LIV Golf: Bryson DeChambeau wins in Singapore after 'brutal' play-off

articles.description: With more sunshine seen than snow at the Winter Paralympics, calls for the Games to move in the calendar grow stronger.
articles.title: Winter Paralympics: Should event be moved amid climate change challenges?

articles.description: World number two Jannik Sinner puts on a masterclass to beat Alexander Zverev 6-2 6-4 and reach his first final at Indian Wells, while Daniil Medvedev ends Carlos Alcaraz's winning run.
articles.title: Indian Wells: Jannik Sinner to face Daniil Medvedev in maiden California final

articles.description: England put in a superb showing against France, only adding to the intrigue around a dismal Six Nations campaign overall
articles.title: Six Nations 2026: England intrigue increases in defeat by France

articles.description: BBC Sport visits Kansas City Current and Denver Summit to learn why these US franchises are the first to build venues specifically for women's football.
articles.title: NWSL: Why US soccer franchises have bespoke women's football stadiums, and will WSL teams follow suit?
